2.anchor: This is how we know if they have the Spirit of God: If a person claiming to be a prophet

19.note: Greek We love. We love God; We love him.

20.anchor: If someone says, “I love God,” but hates a fellow believer,

21.anchor: And he has given us this command: Those who love God must also love their fellow believers.
21.note: Greek The one who loves God must also love his brother.

1.anchor: We proclaim to you the one who existed from the beginning,
1.note: Greek What was from the beginning.

4.anchor: We are writing these things so that you may fully share our joy.
4.note: Or so that our joy may be complete; your joy.

5.anchor: This is the message we heard from Jesus

1.anchor: Everyone who believes that Jesus is the Christ

6.anchor: And Jesus Christ was revealed as God’s Son by his baptism in water and by shedding his blood on the cross
6.note: Greek This is he who came by water and blood.

7.anchor: So we have these three witnesses
7.note: A few very late manuscripts add in heaven—the Father, the Word, and the Holy Spirit, and these three are one. And we have three witnesses on earth.

20.anchor: And we know that the Son of God has come, and he has given us understanding so that we can know the true God.
20.note: Greek the one who is true.

21.anchor: Dear children, keep away from anything that might take God’s place in your hearts.

10.anchor: So now we can tell who are children of God and who are children of the devil. Anyone who does not live righteously and does not love other believers
10.note: Greek does not love his brother.

13.anchor: So don’t be surprised, dear brothers and sisters,

14.anchor: If we love our brothers and sisters who are believers,

10.anchor: Anyone who loves a fellow believer

12.anchor: because your sins have been forgiven through Jesus.

13.anchor: I am writing to you who are mature in the faith

20.anchor: But you are not like that, for the Holy One has given you his Spirit,
20.note: Greek But you have an anointing from the Holy One.

22.anchor: And who is a liar? Anyone who says that Jesus is not the Christ.
Anyone who denies the Father and the Son is an antichrist.
